title: [DOCS] Update rootless_tutorial to refer to pasta besides slirp4netns
body:
### Issue Description

The [rootless_tutorial](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/docs/tutorials/rootless_tutorial.md) linked from [README#Rootless](https://github.com/containers/podman#rootless) has as its 3rd item:

> Install `slirp4netns`

Following its replacement with `pasta` in podman 5, this section should be updated to refer to it instead.

I would also suggest the updated mention touch upon the one shortcoming of this change outlined on https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/rootless.md?plain=1#L11-L12 regarding containers IP addresses being copied from the host by default, limiting communication.

Thank you for your work 🙏🏻

### Steps to reproduce the issue

N/A

### Describe the results you received

N/A

### Describe the results you expected

N/A

### podman info output

N/A

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Additional information
